description: CompositionBlack ankle length pants made of 55% cotton and 45% cupro, with rolled hems, two insert pockets on the sides on the front, two insert pockets on the back, button and zippered fly and with buttoned flap belt loopsFittingRegularWash care Warm delicate machine wash with similar colours Wash garment inside out Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Line dry in shade Cool iron on reverse side Drycleanable Take feminine dressing to the next level in these black pants from forever new. The soft fabric and the rolled hems keeps these pants looking fresh. Team this with a white sleeveless top and ballerina flats for a girly look.Model statisticsHeight-5'8”, Waist - 26”, Hips – 36”
